file_name: Questionnaire - Swiss Re - QBE Insurance's Trade Credit and Surety business_1.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Swiss Re and QBE’s TC&S Business are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Swiss Re and/or QBE.
